title: history arc 02 lazygit investigation and harvest
summary: The development thread focuses on an investigation into lazygit, followed by the harvest of notes and code changes. Key decisions included adding notes files, a cursor-block fix, and version tag corrections in PR #5, and harvesting 399 lines of notes into BUGS.md in PR #12. The outcome was the integration of investigation artifacts into the main codebase, with some notes removed and new content added.
